# Samuel Peña - Portfolio

## About
Full-Stack Jr. Developer from Venezuela. Associate Degree in Computer Science (IUJO, May 2026). Bilingual (Spanish native, English C1). Passionate about clean code, scalable web applications, and agile solutions.

## Tech Stack
- **Languages:** PHP, JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, SQL, HTML5, CSS3, Python (basic)
- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, Vue.js (basic), Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
- **Backend:** Laravel, Node.js (Express), RESTful APIs, GraphQL, WordPress
- **Databases:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, Supabase, Firebase, MongoDB (basic)
- **DevOps:** Git, Docker (basic), CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Vercel, Netlify, AWS
- **Methodologies:** Agile (Scrum/Kanban), AI-assisted development, Technical SEO, CRM Automation (HubSpot, GoHighLevel)

## Projects

### TrainUP
Gym management platform. Mobile-first SaaS for memberships, bookings, payments, body metrics, admin dashboard, client portal, notifications, and reporting.
- Landing: https://trainup.lat/
- Demo: https://demo.trainup.lat/demo
- Admin demo: demo@trainup.lat / Demo123!
- Client demo: demo.user1@trainup.lat / password

## Experience
1. **Full-Stack Developer Intern** at Keycode Agencia Digital (Feb 2026 – May 2026, Remote, Mexico)
2. **Web Developer & Community Manager** at The Loctor Family of REALTORS® (Oct 2024 – May 2026, Remote, US)

- Claude Code in Action (Anthropic)

## Volunteering
IT Support Volunteer at Venezuelan Red Cross - Barquisimeto chapter (Aug 2025 – Dec 2025). Hardware recovery, network infrastructure renewal, technical documentation, and digital literacy training.
